narration: You've promised yourself you'd start saving next week hundreds of times. That one habit has a six-figure price tag. Let's do the math.
visual: Dark background. Title 'THE START MONDAY TRAP' springs in. Calendar SVG with NEXT WEEK header, big red X over dates. Counter animates 0 to 312 labeled BROKEN PROMISES TO START.

narration: Your brain is wired to pick now over later — scientists call it hyperbolic discounting. It's not a willpower problem. And it costs a lot.
visual: Light background. Large amber NOW bubble and small gray LATER bubble. Red arrow labeled BRAIN PICKS points at NOW. 87% stat fades in below with 'OF NON-SAVERS SAY THEY'LL START SOON'.

narration: Here's the math: start at twenty-five instead of twenty-eight and you're a hundred and eighty-seven thousand dollars richer at retirement. Same investment, three extra years.
visual: Dark background. Two diverging line charts animate in — amber line Age 25 climbs steeply, dim white line Age 28 lags behind. '-$187,000 THE DELAY PENALTY' red badge appears.

narration: Each year you delay burns fifty-eight thousand dollars of future wealth. That math locks in the moment you postpone — the clock is always running.
visual: Light background. Piggy bank SVG with red X marks. Dollar counter animates $0 to $58K in red. Amber badge reads 'PER YEAR OF DELAY at 7% return'.

narration: Seven in ten non-savers say they'll start soon. The average real delay is three point two years. That's the most expensive soon ever measured.
visual: Dark background. Row of 10 person silhouettes reveal one by one — 7 amber, 3 gray. Large '7 IN 10' stat. Red '3.2 YRS AVERAGE DELAY' badge fades in below.

narration: The fix isn't willpower — it's automation. Set up one dollar a day right now, not Monday. Your future self doesn't get a vote on the delay.
visual: Light background. Calendar with today's date circled in amber. Amber box: AUTOMATE TODAY — Not Monday. Not next month. Today. Green dollar circle pops in. Black FOLLOW FOR MORE CTA badge.
